# Attr.AllowedRev.txt 知识梳理

> 来源: `Attr.AllowedRev.txt` | 字数: 255

## 内容全文

Attr.AllowedRev

TYPE: lookup

VERSION: 1.6.0

DEFAULT: array()

--DESCRIPTION--

List of allowed reverse document relationships in the rev attribute. This

attribute is a bit of an edge-case; if you don't know what it is for, stay

away.

--# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
